- Shop adapter for gopro mount - Amazon.com® Official Site: Find deals and compare prices on adapter for gopro mount at Amazon.com. Browse & discover thousands of brands. Read customer reviews & find best sellers
- ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter: The mount features a 3-prong action camera mount with a thumbscrew on top and a 1/4"-20 female thread on the bottom. It is designed to adapt your 2-prong camera mount onto a tripod or rig with a 1/4"-20 screw mount.
- Amazon.com: Gopro Mount Adapter: Explore versatile GoPro mount adapters compatible with tripods, monopods, and selfie sticks. Find quality options for secure mounting.
- Tripod Adapters | GoPro: These adapters let you attach your GoPro to any tripod, monopod or camera accessory with a standard 1/4-20 mount. The finger adapter lets you mount your GoPro directly to the tripod, while the ball joint adapter makes your tripod more versatile by letting you tilt and rotate your camera to find the 
- Camera Mounting Bolt to GoPro HERO Mount Connection Adapter: This versatile adapter transforms your standard camera mount or tripod into a GoPro-compatible accessory. build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 25, 25)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(6).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=25).rect(48, 23).extrude(1)

STEP 4: Create 3-prong clip top — cq.Workplane("XY").moveTo(-10, -12.5).lineTo(10, -12.5).lineTo(0, -25).close().extrude(25)

STEP 5: Add 1/4-20 thread insert bottom — .faces("<Z").workplane().circle(6).cutThruAll()
